title: Generate report with monday
excerpt:
Hi monday users, 
Looking to generate a weekly report with the tasks my employees created. 
Any tips? 
Could be super helpful!!

posts.author: JaniceB (Janice Bowen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi monday users,
Looking to generate a weekly report with the tasks my employees created.
Any tips?
Could be super helpful!!

posts.author: JCorrell (Jim - The Monday Man)
posts.cookedHtml:
@JaniceB

Here are some thoughts…

You might want to check out this thread:

I want to email a digest of tasks finished in the last week Special workflows & use cases
Hey Everyone, We send a project status report every week. It needs to because some folks want include it in their presentations. Is there an automation to create a digest of tasks completed in the last 7 days, then include those tasks in an email template and send the email? I’d love to hear what y’all have tried. Thanks, Jonathan

You could use something like this automation or the custom automation:

image805×594 15.5 KB

image900×407 19.4 KB

Adding a “Creation Log” column to the board would allow you to filter by person and creation date. You could then export the filtered items to Excel.

Finally, to automate the entire process, I would recommend creating a Make/Integromat scenario.

Jim - The Monday Man (YouTube Channel)
Watch Our Latest Video: https://youtu.be/SARq3tmCIX8
Contact me directly here: Contact – The Monday Man

posts.cookedHtml: hi we can do that please allow me DM

posts.author: johannesgeyer (Johannes Geyer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @JaniceB

You can try our new app PDF Report Generator?

With this app, you can use the report builder to create your own layout for the PDF, or if you need more flexibility, create a docx template. The app uses Word templates with placeholders. So you can specify which columns you want to export and create your own design. You can also use tables inside the Word template to reproduce the look of monday or create your own version.
https://www.pdfreportgenerator.com/help/template/

As a starting point, you can also use one of the pre-made templates from our Template Gallery.

SingleProject800×562 30.9 KB

It’s also possible to create a monday automation so that the report is automatically send via email every day / week / month.

If you need more advanced features like QR codes or custom email templates, try DocExport PDF Generator .

Both apps work with formulas, mirror-columns, images, Charts and so on.

If you have any questions, feel free to reach out to us: support@towerapps.com

@JCorrell
